title: 白昼の決闘・おはぎ譲り合い決戦

text_block_list.name: Elderly Storekeeper
text_block_list.text:
Thanks so much for helping my son and his wife
with their move.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Don't mention it! You're always doing so much for
us, after all.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I didn't think we'd have everything done by noon,
but having two people on it really helped speed
things along.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, we sure like to compete a whole lot, but
working together like this isn't too bad, huh?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Heh. Well, if we were always cooperating like
this, I'd get thrown off my game.

text_block_list.name: Elderly Storekeeper
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right. I'm sure I've got some ohagi
cakes around here, so why don't you eat those
before you head home?

text_block_list.name: Elderly Storekeeper
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, looks like there's three left. I've only just
had breakfast, so you two share them between
yourselves.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Take two of them, Vodka. I'm sure you're tired
after carrying that big chest of drawers.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
No, no, you were the one lugging that fridge
around. You should take two.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that was no trouble at all. You must be more
fatigued than me. I definitely heard you let out a
sigh after you were done.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Um, sorry? Who was the one grunting and trying
to psyche herself up the whole time?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
That was just for encouragement! I was saying
"Phew!" to sympathize with you after all that
physical labor you endured!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Now you're splitting hairs! That was nowhere near
enough work to tire me out! Just hurry up and
take them!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'll have you know that I'm not tired in the least! They're all yours, Vodka!

text_block_list.name: Vodka & Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Grrrrr!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Just glaring at each other won't get us anywhere!
Let's compete to see who's more worn out!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Very well! How about a one-lap race around the
neighborhood then?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Bring it on! This spot's the finish line! Whoever's
more tired by the end gets the extra cake!

text_block_list.name: Vodka & Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Rrrraaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Elderly Storekeeper
text_block_list.text:
...Goodness. It's nice that they're so full of
energy.
